categories: Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian
events.description:
Venue: Blue Nile
Starts: 2026-05-28T19:00:00.000-07:00
Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other
More info: https://www.showpass.com/irvin-mayfield-at-bluenile-2026/
Tickets: https://www.showpass.com/irvin-mayfield-at-bluenile-2026/

Irvin Mayfield is a Billboard and two-time Grammy Award- winning artist, composer, and producer. His 30+ record discography and published written works keynote three decades of world-tours, recorded performances, and collaborations with distinguished artists such as Stevie Wonder, Bob Weir, Frank Ocean, Aaron Neville, Wynton Marsalis, and Trombone Shorty.

A humanist born, raised, and presently residing in New Orleans, LA, Mayfield espouses a daily practice of constant reimagination in his community. His upcoming recording and live performance projects engage global thought leadership edging on the frontiers of art, media, technology and beauty.

After your Museum visit, join us for a live instrumental showcase of wartime piano music at The Higgins Hotel's Patriots Circle Lounge! Guests of all ages can tap along to favorites like “Sentimental Journey” and “I’ll Be Seeing You” and learn how these tunes coincided with significant events of World War II. Beverages are available for purchase at Kilroy's Bar & Lounge.

Categories: Music - Cajun, Zydeco, Music - R&B, Funk, Brass Band, MG Indian, Music - Rock, Pop, Roots, Cover, Music - Classical, Music - Jazz & Blues, Music - Acoustic, Songwriter, Ethnic, Music - Other

Tickets: https://www.showpass.com/soul-rebels-blue-nile-may-2026/

A﻿DVANCE TICKETS $20

The Soul Rebels started with an idea – to expand upon the pop music they loved on the radio and the New Orleans brass tradition they grew up on. They took that tradition and blended funk and soul with elements of hip hop, jazz and rock all within a brass band context. The band has built a career around an eclectic live show that harnesses the power of horns and drums in a deep pocket funk party-like atmosphere. The Soul Rebels continue to chart new territory as they feature in major films, tour globally, and combine topnotch musicianship with songs that celebrate dancing, life, funk and soul.

"WE PARTYIN'!" 

Advance Tickets & Reserved Seating bluenilelive.com

Kermit Ruffins needs only two words to hype a New Orleans barroom for one of his weekly shows, and this, his personal slogan, sums up what this Big Easy ambassador is all about.

From playing himself in the HBO Series Treme, to barbecuing outside his bar, Kermit’s Treme Mother-inLaw Lounge, to sitting in with Jon Batiste and Stay Human on The Late Show with Stephen Colbert, the trumpeter/vocalist keeps himself busy when he isn’t on stage doing what he does best—entertaining and sharing his love of life with the world. He personifies the laid-back vibe of New Orleans.

"WE PARTYIN'!" 

Advance Tickets & Reserved Seating bluenilelive.com

Kermit Ruffins needs only two words to hype a New Orleans barroom for one of his weekly shows, and this, his personal slogan, sums up what this Big Easy ambassador is all about.

From playing himself in the HBO Series Treme, to barbecuing outside his bar, Kermit’s Treme Mother-inLaw Lounge, to sitting in with Jon Batiste and Stay Human on The Late Show with Stephen Colbert, the trumpeter/vocalist keeps himself busy when he isn’t on stage doing what he does best—entertaining and sharing his love of life with the world. He personifies the laid-back vibe of New Orleans.

events.description:
Venue: Marigny Opera House
Starts: 2026-07-29T23:00:00.000-06:00
Ends: 2026-08-02T22:59:59.999-06:00
Categories: New Orleans & Louisiana Culture, Arts: Museums, Galleries, Film, Books, Theater, Stage & Dance, Events - Miscellaneous
More info: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/you-have-no-idea-how-far-ill-go-a-new-performance-by-calvin-rowe-tickets-1990490645102
Tickets: https://www.eventbrite.com/e/1990501699165

Thurs-Sun, July 30-Aug. 2, 2026

7:30PM Doors | 8:00PM Shows

A new performance by Calvin Rowe and DancersOriginal live and electronic score by Landon Strause and Sierra Carvalho

Performed by an ensemble of eight dancers and accompanied by an original live and electronic score, the premiere of You Have No Idea How Far I’ll Go is a haunting dance-noir exploration of light, sound, and movement. Inspired by the mythology of Orpheus’ journey into the underworld, choreographer Calvin Rowe creates an immersive contemporary dance experience that you don't want to miss.

Blending atmospheric electronic composition with live performance, this new work invites audiences into a world where myth and modern movement collide.

Featuring Performances ByCameron GibsonCullen BarrilleauxSierra CarvalhoMa'Kayla ParkerNatalie SunseriLeah LogsdonArden McKeeCalvin Rowe

events.title: FREE monthly line dance classes at The Blue Crab! All skill levels welcome. Hip-hop, country, R&B, zydeco & NOLA classics. Just bring water & dancing spirit!
events.description:
Venue: The Blue Crab
Starts: 2026-08-15T11:00:00.000-04:00
Ends: 2026-08-15T12:00:00.000-04:00
Categories: Theater, Stage & Dance
More info: https://local.aarp.org/new-orleans-la/aarp-events/

Get your weekend started right with AARP Louisiana's "Movin' and Groovin'" - a free monthly outdoor line dance class at The Blue Crab's scenic lower patio! Perfect for all skill levels, these energetic sessions feature diverse music including hip-hop, country, R&B, zydeco, and New Orleans classics. No experience needed - bring comfortable clothes, water, and your dancing spirit! All ages welcome!

Please sign up here: https://local.aarp.org/new-orleans-la/aarp-events/

Address: 7900 Lakeshore Dr, New Orleans, LA 70124

Time: 10 am - 11 am

Dates: 

-Saturday, September 20

-Saturday, October 18

-Saturday, November 15

-Saturday, December 20

-Third Saturday of the Month
